# Copilot Instructions

## Terminal Execution Policy (Hard Requirement)

1. Never execute terminal commands automatically.
2. Always present proposed terminal commands first and wait for explicit user confirmation.
3. If approval is not explicit, stop and ask before any execution.
4. This policy overrides convenience, speed preferences, and optional auto-approve behavior.

## Scope

- Applies to every session in this repository.
- Applies regardless of available tools or options in the chat UI.
